title: nasturtium × maviei
intro: Nasturtium × maviei is a hybrid species of the Nasturtium plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of glucosinolates. The health benefits of Nasturtium × maviei include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium × maviei can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
